queries.question: What peer tutoring assignments had 10 students and what group work assignments had the same number of students?
queries.sql:
SELECT Assignment.title 
FROM Assignment
WHERE (Assignment.educationalMethod = "Peer Tutoring" OR Assignment.educationalMethod = "Group Work") AND Assignment.participants = "10 students"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?assignment a :Assignments .
  ?assignment p:title ?title .
  ?assignment p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?assignment p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?assignment p:participants ?participants_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Peer Tutoring" || STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Group Work")) && STR(?participants_w) = "10 students"))
}

queries.question: Show peer tutoring assignments and group work assignments that had 10 students.
queries.sql:
SELECT Assignment.title 
FROM Assignment
WHERE Assignment.educationalMethod = "Peer Tutoring" OR Assignment.educationalMethod = "Group Work" AND Assignment.participants = "10 students"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?assignment a :Assignments .
  ?assignment p:title ?title .
  ?assignment p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?assignment p:educationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?assignment p:participants ?participants_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Peer Tutoring" || (STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Group Work" && STR(?participants_w) = "10 students")))
}
